mapper.select: SELECT es.* FROM exam_seat es LEFT JOIN exam_student_room esr ON es.seatId = esr.seatId AND esr.examCode = #{examCode} WHERE es.roomId = #{roomId} AND (esr.assignId IS NULL OR esr.status = '3') AND es.status = '0' ORDER BY es.rowNumber, es.columnNumber
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO exam_seat (roomId, seatNumber, rowNumber, columnNumber, status) VALUES
(#{roomId}, #{seat.seatNumber}, #{seat.rowNumber}, #{seat.columnNumber}, '0')
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_seat SET status = #{status} WHERE seatId = #{seatId}
